technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Technology name to find companies using it (e.g. 'Salesforce', 'Stripe', 'React')

country.title: Country Filter
country.description: Filter results by country name (partial match, optional)

industry.title: Industry Filter
industry.description: Filter results by industry (partial match, optional)

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of companies to collect

hunterApiKey.title: Hunter.io API Key (optional)
hunterApiKey.description: Provide your Hunter.io key to enrich results with verified email addresses and contact patterns

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy settings (residential recommended for reliability)
